title: TODO's and FIXME's [PART 1]
body:
Fix a number of TODO's and FIXME's across the code base.  Please refer to the individual commits for details.

```release-note
* Fix an issue in `podman image mount` where the pretty table for multiple images was not printed.
* Add auto-completion to `podman search --filter`.
```

Restarted the flake - the flake has been fixed in the meantime.
